section_name: Voluntary Contribution for Trafficked Persons Program Account
text:
(a) When a person applies for an original, renewal, corrected, or duplicate driver’s license or personal identification certificate under this chapter, the department shall, in a conspicuous manner, direct that person to the opportunity to donate to the trafficked persons program account established under Section 50.0153 (Establishment of Account) , Health and Safety Code, through the state’s electronic Internet portal described by Section 2054.252 (State Electronic Internet Portal Project) (h), Government Code.

(b) The department may deduct from the donations made under this section an amount equal to the department’s reasonable expenses associated with administering this section.

Sec. 521.014. TEXAS 1836 PROJECT PAMPHLET. (a) The department shall provide the pamphlet described by Section 451.005 (Pamphlet) , Government Code, to persons who receive a driver’s license:

(1) after applying under Section 521.144; or

(2) with an expiration provided by Section 521.271 (License Expiration) (a-2) or (a-3).

(b) The department shall make the pamphlet described by Section 451.005 (Pamphlet) , Government Code, available to the public on the department’s Internet website.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 521.013 (Voluntary Contribution for Trafficked Persons Program Account) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(60), eff. September 1, 2023.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.013 — Voluntary Contribution for Trafficked Persons Program Account

(a) When a person applies for an original, renewal, corrected, or duplicate driver’s license or personal identification certificate under this chapter, the department shall, in a conspicuous manner, direct that person to the opportunity to donate to the trafficked persons program account established under Section 50.0153 (Establishment of Account) , Health and Safety Code, through the state’s electronic Internet portal described by Section 2054.252 (State Electronic Internet Portal Project) (h), Government Code.

(b) The department may deduct from the donations made under this section an amount equal to the department’s reasonable expenses associated with administering this section.

Sec. 521.014. TEXAS 1836 PROJECT PAMPHLET. (a) The department shall provide the pamphlet described by Section 451.005 (Pamphlet) , Government Code, to persons who receive a driver’s license:

    (1) after applying under Section 521.144; or

    (2) with an expiration provided by Section 521.271 (License Expiration) (a-2) or (a-3).

(b) The department shall make the pamphlet described by Section 451.005 (Pamphlet) , Government Code, available to the public on the department’s Internet website.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 521.013 (Voluntary Contribution for Trafficked Persons Program Account) by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 768 (H.B. 4595 ), Sec. 24.001(60), eff. September 1, 2023.

*Added by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 818 (H.B.2497), Sec. 2, eff. September 1, 2021.*
